text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex — glad to have you as a moderator. Jump into the welcome channel if you want pointers on the current workflow or community norms.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam — you’re in as an event helper. If you need a quick rundown on scheduling, check-in flow, or escalation paths, say the word.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina — glad to have you as a mentor. We’ll lean on you for guidance and support in the community.
